title: Smoky Stir Fry
description: A savory and slightly sweet stir fry made with smoky flavors and crunchy textures.

ingredients.name: stir-fry vegetables (e.g. broccoli, carrots, bell peppers)

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the smoky stir-fry sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the cooked brown rice and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the chopped dates and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Transfer to a serving dish and garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
